description: Detect MongoDB auth errors on connection failure and show a credentials dialog with masked password field instead of just a toast

userStories.title: Add auth error detection and credentials form state
userStories.description: As a user, when I connect to a MongoDB instance that requires auth and my URI lacks credentials, I want to see a credentials prompt instead of just an error toast
acceptanceCriteria: New state added: showCredentials, username, password, pendingUri, pendingName, authError
handleConnect detects auth errors (case-insensitive match on: authentication failed, requires authentication, not authorized, bad auth)
Auth errors set showCredentials=true and store URI in pendingUri, name in pendingName
Non-auth errors still show as toast (existing behavior preserved)
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Auth error detection is the foundation — must land before the UI form

userStories.title: Add credentials form UI with masked password
userStories.description: As a user, when an auth error is detected, I want to see username and password fields so I can provide credentials to connect
acceptanceCriteria: When showCredentials is true, main connection form is replaced with credentials form
Username Input field is present
Password Input field uses type=password (shows dots, not plaintext)
Connect button and Back button are present
Back button resets credentials state and returns to main connection form
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Only modifies ConnectionDialog.tsx — credentials form replaces main form when showCredentials is true

userStories.title: Inject credentials into URI and connect
userStories.description: As a user, when I submit credentials, I want them injected into the MongoDB URI and a connection attempt made
acceptanceCriteria: injectCredentials helper uses regex (not URL API) to handle replica set URIs with comma-separated hosts
Handles both mongodb:// and mongodb+srv:// schemes
Strips existing credentials from URI before injecting new ones
Special characters in username/password are percent-encoded via encodeURIComponent
On success: dialog closes
On auth error again: inline error message shown (red text), stays on credentials form
On non-auth error: toast shown
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Regex: strip existing creds with /^(mongodb(?:\+srv)?:\/\/)[^@]*@/ then prepend new creds

userStories.title: Defer connection saving until after successful connect
userStories.description: As a user, when I provide a connection name and credentials, I want the saved URI to include my credentials so auto-reconnect works next time
acceptanceCriteria: handleSubmit no longer saves before connecting — name is stored in pendingName state
On successful connect (both normal and credentials paths): if name was provided, saveConnection is called with the credential-injected URI
Saved connections with baked-in creds reconnect without re-prompting
Editing existing saved connection and re-authenticating updates the saved URI
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
userStories.notes: URIs are encrypted at rest via safeStorage — safe to save with credentials
